caption: A man with a beard and mustache is seated in a black chair in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, gold necklaces, and large grey over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, a white wall features gold stars and the words "HUSTLE" repeating. To his right, a screen displays "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Across the sequence, the man shifts his posture and gaze; initially looking down and to the side, he then turns his head to look directly toward the camera with a neutral expression. The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up as he slightly adjusts his position while remaining seated.
